name: Pipedream
description: Integration and workflow automation platform that connects APIs, AI, databases and services. Recently emphasizing AI agent capabilities for automating complex workflows. Now part of Workday.
notes: Acquired by Workday in Nov 2025. Platform recently expanded AI agent capabilities with 'Prompt, run, and deploy AI agents in seconds' feature. Trusted by 1M+ developers. Focus on code-first integration workflows.
